requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Niger BESS Project Acceptance and Donor-Lender Procurement
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为尼日尔BESS项目验收和捐助方-贷款方采购的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為尼日BESS項目驗收和捐助方-貸款方採購的國際基準

summary.en: Niger does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation with a national conformity assessment route (such as a mandatory certificate of conformity, type approval, or pre-market certification). ARSE, as the electricity sector regulator, has not published a confirmed mandatory national technical regulation specifically requiring IEC 62619 certification for BESS cells as of the dataset date. However, IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally accepted safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and it is the standard expected and typically required by donor-lender procurement frameworks for World Bank, AfDB, and EU-financed solar-plus-storage projects in Niger. Project owners and EPCs acting under donor-lender procurement rules therefore treat IEC 62619 compliance as a mandatory technical prerequisite for BESS cell and module acceptance. Additionally, IEC 62133-2:2017 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells) and IEC 62619:2022 together form the cell-level safety evidence base expected in international project specifications. For BESS projects in Niger, the donor lender's procurement standards and the project-specific technical specification set the de facto mandatory safety evidence requirements in the absence of a confirmed national mandatory regulation.
summary.zh: 尼日尔尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，也没有建立国家合格评定路径（如强制合格证书、型式批准或上市前认证）。截至本数据集日期，作为电力行业监管机关的ARSE尚未发布经确认的专门要求BESS电芯IEC 62619认证的强制国家技术法规。然而，IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际公认安全标准，是尼日尔世界银行、非洲开发银行和欧盟资助太阳能加储能项目的捐助方-贷款方采购框架所期望并通常要求的标准。因此，依据捐助方-贷款方采购规则行事的项目业主和EPC承包商将IEC 62619合规视为BESS电芯和模组验收的强制技术前提。此外，IEC 62133-2:2017（便携式密封二次锂电池安全要求）和IEC 62619:2022共同构成国际项目规格中预期的电芯级安全证据基础。对于尼日尔的BESS项目，在缺乏经确认的国家强制法规的情况下，捐助方贷款机构的采购标准和项目专属技术规格实际上确立了强制性安全证据要求。
summary.zht: 尼日尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，也沒有建立國家合格評定路徑（如強制合格證書、型式批准或上市前認證）。截至本數據集日期，作為電力行業監管機關的ARSE尚未發布經確認的專門要求BESS電芯IEC 62619認證的強制國家技術法規。然而，IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際公認安全標準，是尼日世界銀行、非洲開發銀行和歐盟資助太陽能加儲能項目的捐助方-貸款方採購框架所期望並通常要求的標準。因此，依據捐助方-貸款方採購規則行事的項目業主和EPC承包商將IEC 62619合規視為BESS電芯和模組驗收的強制技術前提。此外，IEC 62133-2:2017（便攜式密封二次鋰電池安全要求）和IEC 62619:2022共同構成國際項目規格中預期的電芯級安全證據基礎。對於尼日的BESS項目，在缺乏經確認的國家強制法規的情況下，捐助方貸款機構的採購標準和項目專屬技術規格實際上確立了強制性安全證據要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; required in donor-financed project specifications in Niger)

IEC 62133-2:2017 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (supplementary cell-level safety standard)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)

World Bank Group Environmental and Social Standard ESS3 — Resource Efficiency and Pollution Prevention (battery chemistry, hazardous materials, and end-of-life management requirements for World Bank-financed BESS projects)

ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Électricité (verify current regulated product list and any mandatory technical regulations directly with ARSE; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific technical regulation as of dataset date)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which is the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents in donor-lender procurement reviews for Niger BESS projects. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619:2022 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. Furthermore, for World Bank and AfDB-financed projects, evidence of battery chemistry selection aligned with donor ESF standards — including hazardous substance limits and end-of-life recycling or disposal plans — is required as part of the procurement package.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），是大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被尼日尔BESS项目捐助方-贷款方采购审查接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619:2022型式试验证据。此外，对于世界银行和非洲开发银行资助的项目，采购包中还须提供符合捐助方ESF标准的电池化学体系选择证据——包括有害物质限量和报废回收或处置计划。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），是大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被尼日BESS項目捐助方-貸款方採購審查接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619:2022型式試驗證據。此外，對於世界銀行和非洲開發銀行資助的項目，採購包中還須提供符合捐助方ESF標準的電池化學體系選擇證據——包括有害物質限量和報廢回收或處置計劃。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Donor-lender procurement frameworks for World Bank, AfDB, and EU-financed BESS projects in Niger treat IEC 62619 as the mandatory cell and module safety evidence baseline. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or procurement reviews. Additional Niger-specific gaps: (a) high-temperature cycle-life evidence — Niger's operating environment (≥45°C ambient, container temperatures can reach ≥60°C without active cooling) requires documentation of cycle-life performance at elevated temperature; IEC 62619 standard tests do not fully replicate these conditions; supplement with manufacturer test data at 45–55°C ambient; (b) donor ESF requirements — World Bank ESF ESS3 requires a battery hazardous substance and end-of-life management plan; LFP chemistry is generally preferred over NMC for donor-funded projects in fragile-state contexts due to lower thermal-runaway risk; (c) ARSE regulatory compliance — verify with ARSE whether any national conformity obligation exists for BESS cells and modules before import; (d) ILAC-accredited test evidence — IEC 62619 type-test certificates must be from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratories are ILAC members and their certificates are generally acceptable if the scope covers IEC 62619.
gap.zh: 关键差距：世界银行、非洲开发银行和欧盟资助的尼日尔BESS项目的捐助方-贷款方采购框架将IEC 62619视为强制性电芯和模组安全证据基准。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或采购审查接受为替代依据。尼日尔专属额外差距：（a）高温循环寿命证据——尼日尔运行环境（环境温度≥45°C，无主动冷却的集装箱内温度可达≥60°C）要求提供高温条件下循环寿命性能文件；IEC 62619标准测试不能完全复现这些条件；须补充制造商在45–55°C环境下的测试数据；（b）捐助方ESF要求——世界银行ESF ESS3要求提供电池有害物质和报废管理计划；由于热失控风险较低，在脆弱国家背景下捐助方资助项目通常优先选用磷酸铁锂（LFP）而非三元锂（NMC）；（c）ARSE法规合规——在进口前向ARSE核实BESS电芯和模组是否存在国家合格要求；（d）ILAC认可测试证据——IEC 62619型式试验证书须来自ILAC认可实验室；中国CNAS认可实验室是ILAC成员，若其业务范围涵盖IEC 62619，其证书通常可被接受。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：世界銀行、非洲開發銀行和歐盟資助的尼日BESS項目的捐助方-貸款方採購框架將IEC 62619視為強制性電芯和模組安全證據基準。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或採購審查接受為替代依據。尼日專屬額外差距：（a）高溫循環壽命證據——尼日運行環境（環境溫度≥45°C，無主動冷卻的集裝箱內溫度可達≥60°C）要求提供高溫條件下循環壽命性能文件；IEC 62619標準測試不能完全複現這些條件；須補充製造商在45–55°C環境下的測試數據；（b）捐助方ESF要求——世界銀行ESF ESS3要求提供電池有害物質和報廢管理計劃；由於熱失控風險較低，在脆弱國家背景下捐助方資助項目通常優先選用磷酸鐵鋰（LFP）而非三元鋰（NMC）；（c）ARSE法規合規——在進口前向ARSE核實BESS電芯和模組是否存在國家合格要求；（d）ILAC認可測試證據——IEC 62619型式試驗證書須來自ILAC認可實驗室；中國CNAS認可實驗室是ILAC成員，若其業務範圍涵蓋IEC 62619，其證書通常可被接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice — IEC 62619 compliance is required by donor-lender (World Bank / AfDB / EU) procurement frameworks for BESS cell and module acceptance in Niger projects; no confirmed standalone ARSE mandatory national technical regulation for BESS cells as of dataset date — verify directly with ARSE
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Niger as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619:2022 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety and is treated as a mandatory procurement requirement by World Bank, AfDB, and EU donor-lender project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Niger project acceptance. Supplement with IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Additionally, provide high-temperature cycle-life test data (≥45°C) and a donor ESF-compliant battery chemistry and end-of-life management plan for World Bank and AfDB-financed projects. Verify ARSE current regulatory scope before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，尼日尔尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619:2022是BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准，被世界银行、非洲开发银行和欧盟捐助方-贷款方项目规格视为强制采购要求。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足尼日尔项目验收要求。须补充来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62619型式试验证据。此外，对于世界银行和非洲开发银行资助的项目，还须提供高温循环寿命测试数据（≥45°C）及符合捐助方ESF的电池化学体系和报废管理计划。进口前请向ARSE核实现行监管范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，尼日尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619:2022是BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準，被世界銀行、非洲開發銀行和歐盟捐助方-貸款方項目規格視為強制採購要求。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足尼日項目驗收要求。須補充來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62619型式試驗證據。此外，對於世界銀行和非洲開發銀行資助的項目，還須提供高溫循環壽命測試數據（≥45°C）及符合捐助方ESF的電池化學體系和報廢管理計劃。進口前請向ARSE核實現行監管範圍。
